inputs: structured consultation brief with task, plan step, failed attempts, hypothesis, and focused questions
plan and verification contract artifacts when available
no secrets, credentials, customer PII, private tokens, or unredacted proprietary data

safety.authentication: local Claude Code CLI auth only
safety.credential_policy: no harness-managed username, password, token, cookie, API key, or login automation
boundaries: use claude -p as an advisory reviewer only
grant Read and read-only Bash inspection; do not grant Edit, Write, MultiEdit, or NotebookEdit
do not let the advisor commit, push, install dependencies, or mutate repository state
redact private secrets, customer data, and proprietary identifiers before sending extra context
treat the response as advisory review evidence, never deterministic proof
verify adopted claims with source checks, tests, or project evidence
forbidden_claims: safe to merge based only on Fable output
latest knowledge verified without source evidence

checks: verdict is MUST_FIX, SHOULD_FIX, or SHIP
open_must_fix_count is zero before PR readiness
needs_verification is present for claims that require proof
